prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2025年物理类最低位次约7130名，为该校在湖北省招生唯一可参考的基准位次；2021-2024年，无法判断历史波动趋势；2025年物理类 计划招生8人，2026年计划大幅扩招至13人，增幅达62.5%，扩招幅度显著，预计将明显拉低竞争门槛，使最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学（珠海校区）为98 5、211、双一流高校，共享北京师范大学软科主榜第19名（2026年），属全国顶尖师范类高校，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及 学校管理类舆情辟谣，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；北京师范大学拥有中国史、中国语 言文学、心理学、教育学、马克思主义理论等5个A+学科，以及数学A、地理学A+、生态学A等A类学科，珠海校区开设的数学类、理科试验班等专业与优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数学类（含数学与应用数学、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能等）对应数学/统计、计算机类等热门方向，社会热度为推荐/高热推荐；理科试验班（含地理科学 、心理学、生物科学、化学）中部分方向属生化环材类（明显劝退），但心理学为北师大王牌A+学科。湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计39.1 2万微增约0.6%，竞争环境基本稳定；北京师范大学（珠海校区）位于广东省珠海市，非本省高校，在湖北省无特殊地域偏好；该校在湖北省招生计划占比较小，2025年仅12人（历史类4+物理类8），2026年扩至18人（历史类5+物理类13），属小幅增量。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7130名、202 6年物理类计划大幅扩招62.5%至13人、湖北省考生总数基本持平、学校层次与声誉稳定等因素，供需弹性计算显示位次将明显后移。，考虑扩招幅度大但考 生总数微增、专业热度分化（数学类/人工智能方向偏热、理科试验班部分方向偏冷），小幅上调30名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约9834名，区间9334–10334名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 7130, which is the only reference baseline ranking for this university in Hubei Province; from 2021 to 2024, historical fluctuation trends cannot be determined; in 2025, the Physics Category plans to enroll 8 students, and in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 13 students, an increase of 62.5%, a notable expansion that is expected to significantly lower the competition threshold, causing the minimum ranking to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the 19th place on the Soft Science main ranking of Beijing Normal University (2026), belonging to the top normal universities in China, with strong appeal to candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving rumors about university management, with no major negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; Beijing Normal University has 5 A+ disciplines including Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Psychology, Education, and Marxist Theory, as well as A-level disciplines such as Mathematics A, Geography A+, and Ecology A. The Zhuhai Campus offers majors like Mathematics and Science Experimental Class, which are highly related to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) corresponds to popular directions like Mathematics/Statistics and Computer Science, with social popularity being recommended/highly recommended; the Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biology, Chemistry) has some directions that belong to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials category (clearly discouraged), but Psychology is a flagship A+ discipline of Beijing Normal University. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hubei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to the total of 391,200 for Physics and History categories in 2025, indicating a basically stable competitive environment; Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, not a local university in Hubei, with no special regional preference in Hubei; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province accounts for a small proportion, with only 12 students in 2025 (4 in History Category + 8 in Physics Category), expanding to 18 students in 2026 (5 in History Category + 13 in Physics Category), a small increment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7130, the significant expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan by 62.5% to 13 students in 2026, the basically unchanged total number of candidates in Hubei Province, and the stable university level and reputation, the supply-demand elasticity calculation shows that the ranking will move backward significantly. Considering the large expansion but slight increase in total candidates, and the divergence in major popularity (Mathematics/AI directions are relatively hot, while some directions in the Science Experimental Class are relatively cold), a slight upward adjustment of 30 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 9834, with a range of 9334–10334.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Geography, Psychology, Biology, Chemistry)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics (Data Science Direction), Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Education (Beijing Normal University Education, Beijing Institute of Technology AI Joint Degree Program)
- Biology (National Public-Funded Normal Students).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant expansion, with a predicted ranking of approximately 9834, range 9334–10334. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 9334) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Mathematics (including AI direction); those with rankings in the middle to back of the range should prioritize Tier 2 Science Experimental Class or Social Science Experimental Class; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range can consider Tier 3 Education joint degree or public-funded normal students.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 1026, which is the only reference baseline ranking for this university in Hubei Province; from 2021 to 2024, the historical fluctuation trend cannot be determined; in 2025, the History Category plans to enroll 4 students, and in 2026, the plan expands to 5 students, an increase of 25%, which is moderate and is expected to slightly shift the minimum ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the 19th place (2026) in the Soft Science ranking of Beijing Normal University, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide, with strong appeal to History Category candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management-related rumor refutations, with no major negative events; Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; Beijing Normal University has top-tier disciplines such as Chinese History A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Education A+, Psychology A+, and Marxist Theory A+, and the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, English, History) enrolled by the Zhuhai Campus for History Category directly corresponds to multiple A+ disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended (relatively hot), while Normal/Education majors are in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see; History (Public-Funded Normal Students) offers stable employment and strong appeal. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from 2025, and the scale of History Category candidates is estimated at about 142,500 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025; Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, not a local university in Hubei, with no special regional preference in Hubei; the History Category enrollment plan expands from 4 to 5 students, with limited increment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1026, the 2026 History Category plan expansion of 25% to 5 students, the total number of candidates remaining basically unchanged, the top-tier university level, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and enrolled majors, the supply-demand elasticity calculation shows a slight downward shift in ranking. Considering the strong appeal of Public-Funded Normal Students and the relatively hot popularity of majors like Chinese Language and Literature, a slight upward adjustment of 15 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1195, with a range of 1052–1338.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, English, History).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, History Category sees a slight expansion, with a predicted ranking of approximately 1195, range 1052–1338. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to target the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as the main goal; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1052) can boldly aim for the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range can consider History (Public-Funded Normal Students) as a safe choice. Since History Category has only 2 enrolled majors, the selection space is limited, so it is recommended to make careful decisions based on personal interests and career plans.
